SQLite prototype for the tsecon economic‑calendar EventRepository: This is the SQLite implementation of the EventRepository interface from my economic‑calendar package. It was used for local prototyping and testing. I’m keeping it here as a reference/snapshot, while the actual production code now relies on Firestore. Contains an upsert query, parameterized retrieval, and a test suite.
